hero.name: Yishai Kaminsky
hero.title: AI Automation Builder & IT Systems Specialist
hero.subtitle: I build practical AI systems, automation workflows, and modern internal tools that help teams move faster and operate with less friction.

about.title: About Me
about.bio: I'm an IT and systems professional focused on turning complex operations into reliable, practical workflows. My background spans IT leadership, cloud services, cybersecurity, enterprise support, and hands-on delivery across organizations like Profero, abra, Claroty, Microsoft, and Secure Islands.
about.bio2: Alongside my professional IT work, I build AI-powered tools, automation systems, and Hebrew-first products designed to solve real business problems. I care most about systems that are useful, clear, and ready to work in the real world.

repositories.title: Selected Repositories
repositories.subtitle: A small curated set of repositories that best represents the kind of systems and products I want to be evaluated by.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: If you are hiring for AI, automation, internal tools, or technical operations work, I would be happy to talk.
